title: Gooey Italian Butter Stir-fry
description: A one-pot Italian dish featuring buttery goodness and gooey textures with the addition of soured cream for a creamy finish, perfect as an appetizer or snack.
instructions: Mix Panko bread crumbs with butter, garlic powder, and salt.
Press the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 10 minutes until golden brown.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and sour cream. Add chopped chives to the egg-sour cream mixture.
Pour half of the egg mixture over the crispy bread crumb base on the pan. Spread evenly using a spatula.
Bake for another 5 minutes until golden brown and set around the edges.
Carefully pour remaining egg mixture, including any excess from the bowl, onto the hot bread crumbs. Return to oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes or until completely set and golden.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over top if desired. Serve warm with a side of vegan Parmesan cheese for dipping.
